channel.title: measure on Noam Zaks
channel.description: Recent content in measure on Noam Zaks

item.title: Segment Splitting
item.description:
Given a set of pairwise-disjoint intervals (such that the intersection of every pair is $ \emptyset $) in $ [0, 1] $, assuming the total length is greater than $ \frac 1 2 $, show there are two points $ a,b $ in the union of the segments such that $ |a-b| = \frac 1 {10} $. Here are a few examples
from manim import * class SegmentSplittingExample(Scene): min_width = .
